title: Cnv_AccelLim Function
parameters:
conveyorNumber	Integer expression representing the conveyor number (1 ~ 16).

modeNumber	Integer expression representing the tracking mode of the conveyor tracking (0 to 2)
description:
Cnv_AccelLim Function

Cnv_AccelLim Function

See_Also Example

Returns limit of acceleration and deceleration after the conveyor tracked.
see_also:
Cnv_AccelLim

Cnv_AccelLim Function Example

Print Cnv_AccelLim(1,2)
